calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR MONDAY, SEP-2-2009: JPT ROGER SLEIGHT, CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. ON CALENDAR FOR RE-HEARING OF SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL/TRIAL DE NOVO:

2:00 P.M.: THE CAUSE IS CALLED FOR A RE-HEARING OF A SMALL CLAIM APPEAL/TRIAL DE NOVO.
ANNE HIPSHMAN, ESQ. APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT/APPELLANT DAN LUJAN WHO IS NOT PRESENT;
THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT JAMES QUINLAN, WHO REQUESTED THE RE-HEARING OF THE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL/TRIAL DE NOVO AND SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THE COURT ALLOWS
ADDITION TIME FOR PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT JAMES QUINLAN TO ARRIVE IN THE COURTROOM, TO NO AVAIL.

2:30 P.M.: THEREUPON, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR DUE TO THE NON-APPEARANCE OF RESPONDENT JAMES QUINLAN THIS DATE. THE COURT ORDERS THE ORIGINAL JUDGMENT ENTERED ON JULY 29,2009 STANDS AND REMAINS.

NO NEW JUDGMENT IS ISSUED; NO NEW EVIDENCE RETAINED.

3:15 P.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:31am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Dan Lujan, appears through counsel, Anne Hipshman; No appearance by the Respondent, James Quinlan. Mr. Lujan and 2 witnesses, are sworn. Ms. Hipshman presents Appellants case in narrative form.
Dennis Fry S/E
Jeff Appenroet S/E
10:53am
Matter is submitted, no new evidence is retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Judgment Entered
